updates.summary: This minor release includes numerous bug fixes, performance improvements, and new features such as reference field searchability in list previews, appearance ordering in presentation documents, and document list search result relevance sorting. Notably, several commits were reverted (variant documents creation, useDocumentVersionInfo hook deprecation, and bundle document abstraction), which suggests some instability was caught and rolled back. The volume of changes is large, spanning many subsystems including portable text, form fields, structure, comments, and bundle manager.
ramifications: Portable text block decorator handling was fixed to preserve explicit empty decorator sets, which may affect schemas relying on previous behavior.
